name: DEATH PIT EXPLORER
short_description: FLY THROUGH A DEADLY PIT TO SEE WHAT HORRIBLE SECRET LAY AT ITS DEEPEST DEPTH
detailed_description:
ARE YOU SKILLED ENOUGH TO TRAVERSE THE DEATH PIT?

Deep below the surface of The City's endless sprawl, something terrible festers. Six months ago, a gaping hole opened and swallowed an entire city block. Government-contracted drone operators attempted to explore the pit, but the operation was deemed a failure and the program ended. Now, the drone-operating software has leaked online and many are trying to fly into the pit to uncover its secrets. 

DEATH PIT EXPLORER is a first-person precision-flight game. Your goal is to fly your drone to the bottom of the DEATH PIT. It will not be easy.

THIS GAME-PROGRAM FEATURES:

  • SIX-DEGREES-OF-FREEDOM MOVEMENT: fly a drone freely in six directions through the DEATH PIT

  • UNCONVENTIONAL CONTROLS: gain mastery to conquer the DEATH PIT

  • DEADLY OBSTACLES: experience the white-knuckle thrill of precision navigation in the DEATH PIT

  • HAND-CRAFTED ENVIRONMENTS: witness the surreal locales of the DEATH PIT

  • HIGH DIFFICULTY: your skills will be put to the test, for there is no mercy in the DEATH PIT

WARNING this game may induce motion sickness
